establishment.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport (AASTMT)

overview.short_description: The College of Artificial Intelligence provides education, training, and research in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and intelligent digital systems.
overview.current_status: Active undergraduate college offering AI-related study tracks with practical learning, labs, and applied computing exposure.
overview.future_prospectus: Expected to expand in applied AI research, interdisciplinary intelligent systems development, and stronger industry collaboration aligned with digital transformation needs.

other_conditions: Applicant must satisfy AASTMT admission regulations and the minimum admission score for the assigned program.
Certificate equivalency requirements apply where relevant.

student_regulations.postponement_policy: Students may request semester postponement according to academy regulations and subject to administrative approval.
student_regulations.readmission_policy: Students may apply for readmission according to academy academic regulations and subject to approval by the college.

training_and_practice.description: Students are expected to complete practical training or applied project-based work to strengthen technical readiness and employability.

evidence_based_notes: Partnership evidence mentions Autònoma University of Barcelona.
Partnership evidence mentions University of Central Lancashire (UCLan).

industry_and_external_relations: Academic and partnership links supporting student exposure, collaboration, and applied learning.

vision_mission.vision: To be a leading regional college in artificial intelligence education, research, and innovation.
vision_mission.mission: To prepare graduates with strong scientific foundations, practical AI skills, and the ability to solve real-world problems through high-quality education, research, and industry engagement.

decision_support.heuristic_basis_note: Decision-support values are calibrated heuristic estimates for recommendation use and are not official university facts.

best_fit_traits: Enjoys analytical and abstract problem solving
Interested in AI systems and intelligent automation
program_profiles.summary: Best suited for students who want stronger AI depth, intelligent automation exposure, and technically demanding software-centered careers.
differentiation_notes: Compared with Data Science, this program is more AI-centric and slightly less business/data-analytics oriented.
It fits students aiming for intelligent applications, machine learning systems, and advanced AI engineering roles.

best_fit_traits: Enjoys working with data, patterns, and quantitative reasoning
Interested in analytics, prediction, and decision support
Likes coding with applied real-world use cases
avoid_if: You want minimal statistics or mathematics
program_profiles.summary: Best suited for students who want strong data analysis, predictive modeling, and flexible analytics-to-ML career pathways.
differentiation_notes: Compared with Intelligent Systems, this program is more data-centric and more aligned with analytics and broad data careers.
It offers stronger flexibility for data science, analytics, and remote-friendly technical roles.

notes: All campus_profile values are heuristic estimates for recommendation use.
Signals reflect the branch location context and expected access patterns relative to larger metro markets.

tie_break_rules.when: If final scores are close (difference <= 0.05), prefer the closer campus to the student's city.
If one option beats another by a meaningful margin (difference >= 0.12), choose the better option even if farther.
If the top program is unavailable on the student's preferred campus, recommend the closest alternative within the same program_family.
